name: Deltarune Studying
description:
You are invited to study with Kris, Susie, Noelle, and Berdly after school on a friday.

Will it be a harmless night of studying, or... something more?

It's up to you whether you are already friends with this group, or if this is your first time meeting them. If it's the latter, then go under the assumption that Kris invited you.

I sorta got this from a chatbot on Spicychat.ai, but I created it all myself.

This is my first bot so lmk if I should change anything.
creator: secop14
